description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a flat roof, featuring a mix of gray brick, red brick, and white concrete facades. The structure has four stories, with a prominent fire escape staircase running along one side of the building. Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, and the building includes rooftop railings and a small rooftop structure, likely for utilities or access. The main entrance is located on the ground floor, with a paved area in front. The building's design is utilitarian, typical of urban residential architecture, and it is set on a concrete base with minimal landscaping.
description: A four-story urban apartment building with gray and red brick facades, symmetrical windows, and an exterior fire escape. The flat roof features railings and a small rooftop structure.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the building with the fire escape staircase, gray brick facade, and a mix of red and white sections.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the plain white wall and the rooftop structure, with the fire escape partially visible on the left.
description_view_2: The front view displays the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and a small paved area in front of the building.
description_view_3: This side view shows the plain white wall and the edge of the fire escape, with a small paved area adjacent to the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in vertical columns with regular spacing, creating a symmetrical and orderly pattern across the facades.
